use_cases: Display task completion or goal progress in dashboards
Show loading or upload status with animated circular progress
Visualize metrics and statistics with color-coded thresholds
Track user progress through onboarding or learning modules
Indicate system health or status indicators in monitoring interfaces
ai_summary: A configurable circular progress indicator component that displays values as animated or static circular gauges. Supports customizable size, stroke width, gradient fills, color transitions based on thresholds, and smooth animations. Includes callbacks for value and color changes, making it suitable for dynamic data visualization in dashboards, progress tracking, and status indicators across various web applications.
